title: Sweet Intensely Grilled Malaysian Baguette Satay
description: A sweet and savory take on traditional satay, featuring sashimi-cut baguette grilled to perfection on a binchotan grill.
instructions: Cut the baguette into 1-inch thick slices and set aside.
Melt the butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
Add the honey and kaya jam to the saucepan and stir until smooth.
Grill the pineapple slices on a binchotan grill for 2-3 minutes per side.
Grill the red onion slices on a binchotan grill for 2-3 minutes per side.
In a small bowl, mix together the chopped peanuts, grated coconut, and sesame seeds.
Brush the baguette slices with the melted butter mixture and grill for 1-2 minutes per side.
Place a grilled baguette slice on a serving plate and top with a spoonful of the peanut-coconut mixture, a few slices of grilled pineapple, and a sprinkle of red onion.
Drizzle the coconut milk over the top and sprinkle with salt and black pepper to taste.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients and serve immediately.
